title: Aeneid VI: The Descent to the Underworld
description: Aeneas descends to the underworld and sees the future of Rome — the most influential katabasis after Homer.
introduction: Aeneas descends to the underworld and sees the future of Rome — the most influential katabasis after Homer.

translation.text: Easy is the descent to the underworld. But to retrace your steps and return to the upper air — this is the task, this is the labor.
